description_long: This is a dark wooden bed frame with a modern, geometric design. The headboard and footboard both feature a series of evenly spaced rectangular cutouts, giving the bed a contemporary, open look. The side rails are solid, while the slats on the headboard and footboard add visual interest and structural support. The bed sits on four sturdy, square legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. There is no mattress or bedding present, revealing the flat, supportive platform intended to hold a mattress. The overall appearance is minimalist and robust, suitable for urban interiors or loft-style settings.
description: A dark, modern wooden bed frame with rectangular cutouts in the headboard and footboard, and no visible mattress or bedding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headboard with rectangular cutouts and the solid, elevated frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open slatted design of the footboard and the flat platform surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the footboard with matching rectangular cutouts and the sturdy frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slatted headboard and the flat, open platform.
